name: Baked Spinach
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large frying pan over medium heat.
2. Add the frozen spinach to the pan and break it up with a spatula, stirring until evenly distributed.
3. Stir in the cream cheese and onion soup mix until well combined.
4. Transfer the mixture to a casserole dish.
5. Sprinkle breadcrumbs evenly over the top of the casserole.
6. Place the dish in a preheated oven at 300°F (150°C) and bake for 45 minutes, or until heated through and lightly browned on top.
